title: Assistant Store Manager - DMart Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - DMart Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
DMart Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart Advisory Limited:
DMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart Advisory Limited!
